description: Style NoteThis is a fun choice from catwalk to suit the summer weather! These sandals bring a fashionably new look to a gladiator style and will look great with colourful outfits. Wear them with denim capris, a multi-coloured top and chunky plastic jewellery.Product DeatilsElasticated cross-over straps around foot and ankle for a snug FitSynthetic patent leather back reaching above the ankle with a zip for ease of useTextile covered footbed for absolute comfortTPU outsole with texture for gripFloral lug at heelMaterial and CareSynthetic, fabricWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
